title: Kiryu and Majima - I Got Reincarnated As An Onikabuto (AI cover)
description:
Kiryu and Majima sing I I Got Reincarnated As An Onikabuto.
Anyone who did the latest Genshin event and are familiar with Baka Mitai saw this coming.

Credits:
Kiryu ai voice model - akiyama1996
Majima ai voice model - akiyamashun

Genshin Impact belongs to Hoyoverse
Kazuma Kiryu and Goro Majima from Yakuza belong to Sega
